title: BounceShot
description:
Bounce Your Shots
In BounceShot, you must position your body and weapon so that your shot bounces off a surface and into your target.Solve Puzzles
Every level has a switch that must be hit and droids that must be neutralized. This provides plenty of puzzles and levels where you have to really think about how to use the BounceShot to its full potential.Make The Jumps
BounceShot not only tests your ability to shoot and think, but also your ability to move. Each level is timed and you will have to do some impressive platforming to get the best times.Do It With Style
Speed and Style are rewarded. Reflecting your own shots with a melee is one of the many style techniques that will get you bonus points and medals. There is a high skill ceiling that rewards making use of these stylish techniques.
description_short: BounceShot is a Action Puzzle FPS where all shots must be bounced. Position your body and weapon to fire projectiles that bounce around corners, hit switches on ceilings, or strike unsuspecting droids. Race to each level's exit portal in order to get the best time. Scores reward speed and style!
